meta.title: Wren & Rouge Makeup Artistry
meta.description: Bridal and editorial makeup artistry — soft, luminous looks for weddings, portraits, and special occasions.

hero.headline: Makeup that feels like
hero.lede: Soft, luminous, long-wearing makeup for weddings, portraits, and special occasions — tailored to your skin and your story.

about.heading: Hello, I'm [Your Name]
paragraphs: I've spent the last several years helping brides, models, and everyday clients feel like the best version of themselves — one soft blend at a time. My approach favors skin that still looks like skin, colors that flatter rather than mask, and a finish that photographs beautifully and lasts all day.
Every face is different, so every appointment starts with a conversation: your skin type, the look you're picturing, and the moment you're getting ready for.

items.title: Bridal
items.description: Trial session plus wedding-day application, designed to hold through tears, dancing, and every photo.

items.title: Special event
items.description: Formals, parties, photoshoots — a polished look tailored to the occasion and your outfit.

items.title: Editorial & creative
items.description: Concept-driven makeup for shoots, lookbooks, and portfolios, built from a mood board or brief.

items.title: Bridal party
items.description: Coordinated, camera-ready looks for bridesmaids and family, scheduled alongside the bride.

items.title: Makeup lesson
items.description: A one-on-one session teaching your own routine — everyday, glam, or both.

items.title: Add-ons
items.description: Lashes, airbrush finish, touch-up kits, and travel to your venue.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.note: Placeholder tiles — swap in your own photos.

testimonial.quote: She listened to exactly what I wanted, and somehow made me look like the best version of myself. Everyone at the wedding asked who did my makeup.

booking.heading: Let's find your date
booking.text: Appointments are booked through my online calendar — pick a time that works for you and I'll confirm within a day.

footer.locationBlurb: Bridal & editorial makeup artistry, based in Colorado Springs and available to travel.
